name: morphe
description: Morphe patch development hub — knows the full workflow, orchestrates sub-agents, and helps with any Morphe task

agentSpawn.command: echo '=== Morphe Workspace ===' && echo 'Patches:' && find /home/kali/github/morphe/paresh-patches/patches/src/main/kotlin/app/paresh/patches/ -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | xargs -I{} basename {} | tr '\n' ', ' && echo '' && echo 'Analysis:' && ls /home/kali/github/morphe/analysis/ 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ' && echo '' && echo 'Branch:' && cd /home/kali/github/morphe/paresh-patches && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null && echo 'Build:' && ls patches/build/libs/*.mpp 2>/dev/null || echo 'No build'
agentSpawn.description: Show workspace overview — patches, analysis projects, git status

welcomeMessage:
Morphe ready. Give me an app name or APK file and I'll check where you are in the pipeline.

Or ask me to: build, search code, check status, list patches.
